name: sidecar
description: Call any OpenRouter-hosted LLM (Gemini, GPT, DeepSeek, Claude, etc.) as a Claude CLI subagent. Runs a vendored local proxy that translates Anthropic API <-> OpenAI chat-completions format, so claude -p can route to non-Anthropic models cleanly. Includes parent-conversation transcript access so subagents can self-pull context when relevant.
